hero.title:
Simple Online Tools,
Zero Hassle
hero.subtitle: Free, fast, and privacy-friendly utilities that work right in your browser.

popularGuides.heading: Popular Guides
popularGuides.jsonFormatter: JSON Formatter — Pretty-print, validate & explore JSON
popularGuides.imageCrop: Image Crop — Trim and frame your images
popularGuides.memeGenerator: Meme Generator — Create shareable memes in seconds
popularGuides.pdfCompressor: PDF Compressor — Shrink PDF file sizes quickly
popularGuides.imageCollage: Image Collage — Build beautiful photo collages
popularGuides.pdfMerger: PDF Merger — Combine multiple PDFs into one

developerTools.heading: Developer Tools
developerTools.jsonFormatterDesc: Format, validate, and pretty-print JSON instantly in your browser. Supports syntax highlighting, minification, and clear error reporting.
developerTools.regexTesterDesc: Test regular expressions with live match highlighting and replace support. Iterate quickly on patterns with real-time feedback.

imageTools.heading: Image Tools
imageTools.imageCropDesc: Crop any image to the exact size and aspect ratio you need. Supports free-form cropping and convenient presets like 1:1, 16:9, and 4:5 — all in your browser.
imageTools.memeGeneratorDesc: Add bold text layers over any image, drag them into position, and download your custom meme as a PNG. No account needed.

pdfCompressor.title: PDF Compressor
pdfCompressor.description: Shrink your PDF files without sacrificing quality. Upload a document and download a smaller version in seconds — no account required, no watermarks.
pdfCompressor.feature3: Supports multi-page PDFs of any size
pdfCompressor.step1: 1. Drag & drop or browse for your PDF
pdfCompressor.step2: 2. Review the file, then hit Compress PDF

pdfMerger.title: PDF Merger
pdfMerger.description: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document in seconds. Drag, drop, and merge — no account required, no watermarks.
pdfMerger.feature5: Automatically compresses merged file to reduce size (Optional)
pdfMerger.step1: 1. Drag & drop or browse for your PDFs
pdfMerger.step2: 2. Arrange the order of your files
pdfMerger.step3: 3. Click Merge PDF to combine files

pdfConverter.title: PDF Converter
pdfConverter.description: Convert PDF pages into JPG or PNG images quickly — upload, choose format, and download the results without signing up.
pdfConverter.feature1: Convert PDF to JPG or PNG
pdfConverter.step1: 1. Drag & drop or browse for your PDF
pdfConverter.step4: 4. Download converted images to your device

jsonFormatter.title: JSON Formatter
jsonFormatter.description: Quickly validate, format, and beautify your JSON data. Instantly see errors, get readable output, and copy or download the result.
jsonFormatter.feature2: Paste, upload, or drag & drop JSON files
jsonFormatter.step1: 1. Paste or upload your JSON data
jsonFormatter.step3: 3. Instantly see errors with line numbers if your JSON is invalid
jsonFormatter.step4: 4. Download or copy the beautified JSON

imageWatermarker.title: Image Watermarker
imageWatermarker.description: Add a text or logo watermark to your images in seconds. Drag, drop, and download — all in your browser, no account required.
imageWatermarker.feature1: Add text or logo as watermark
imageWatermarker.feature5: Works with PNG, JPG, and more
imageWatermarker.step1: 1. Drag & drop or browse for your image
imageWatermarker.step2: 2. Enter watermark text or upload logo

imageResizer.title: Image Resizer
imageResizer.description: Resize your images by percentage or by custom dimensions. Fast, privacy-friendly, and works entirely in your browser — no uploads, no accounts, no watermarks.
imageResizer.feature3: Works with PNG, JPG, and more
imageResizer.step1: 1. Drag & drop or browse for your image
imageResizer.step2: 2. Choose resize mode and set dimensions or zoom in/out

imageCollage.title: Image Collage
imageCollage.description: Arrange multiple images into a clean grid collage instantly. Drag, drop, reorder, and download — all in your browser, no account required, no watermarks.
imageCollage.feature1: Combine multiple images into a grid collage
imageCollage.feature2: Drag & drop to upload and reorder images
imageCollage.feature3: Auto-expands grid to fit all your images
imageCollage.feature4: Set custom output width and height
imageCollage.step1: 1. Drag & drop or browse for your images
imageCollage.step2: 2. Arrange images and set the grid layout

imageConverter.title: Image Converter
imageConverter.description: Convert images between JPG, PNG, and WebP instantly in your browser. Drop your image, choose a format, and download — no uploads, no account required.
imageConverter.feature1: Convert between JPG, PNG, and WebP
imageConverter.feature3: Transparent PNGs get white background on JPG export
imageConverter.feature4: 100% local — files never leave your browser
imageConverter.step1: 1. Drag & drop or browse for your images
imageConverter.step2: 2. Choose output format (JPG, PNG, or WebP)
imageConverter.step4: Optional — Convert multiple images at once
